guru.spotStory_eval: {thn} years teaching. One of the highest-rated teachers (★{extra}).
guru.spotStory_wali: {thn} years teaching. A trusted homeroom teacher for {extra} classes.
guru.spotStory_default: {thn} years of dedicated teaching at this school.
guru.flipQ1: What's the teacher-to-student ratio at your school?
guru.flipQ2: What % of teachers hold a teaching certificate?
guru.flipQ3: What's the average weekly teaching load at your school?
guru.flipD1: Ideal is 1:20. The smaller the ratio, the more personal the learning.
guru.flipD2: National target is 100%. Encourage teachers to pursue PPG certification.
guru.flipD3: Minimum standard is 24 hours. Keep below 28 to avoid burnout.
guru.searchPlaceholder2: Search name, NIP, NUPTK, or subject…
guru.hoverHint: Hover a card for quick actions
guru.title: Teachers / Education Staff
guru.guideDescription: Manage all teaching and education staff records. Each teacher can have a login account, teaching schedule, and education data.
guru.tip1: Click a teacher's name to view details: biodata, schedule, journal, subjects taught.
guru.tip2: Teachers cannot be permanently deleted — use Deactivate with a clear reason.
guru.tip3: Inactive teachers retain their data and can be reactivated later.
guru.tip4: Status: PNS (Civil Servant), GTT (Non-permanent Teacher), GTY (Foundation Permanent Teacher).
guru.countActive: {n, plural, one {# active teacher} other {# active teachers}}
guru.countInactive: {n, plural, one {# inactive teacher} other {# inactive teachers}}
guru.nonaktifkanHint: Data is not permanently deleted. The teacher can be reactivated anytime.
guru.confirmNonaktif: Are you sure you want to deactivate {nama}?
